title: TrailGenic Metabolic Flexibility Adaptation Dataset
description: Shell dataset module for TrailGenic physiology adaptation science modeling the development of metabolic flexibility through endurance training and fasted exercise exposure.

records.mechanism: Improved substrate switching between carbohydrate and fat metabolism

supporting_science.finding: Metabolic flexibility is strongly linked to cardiometabolic health and is improved through exercise training.

physiological_response: enhanced fatty acid transport into mitochondria
adaptation_outcomes: reduced metabolic stress during prolonged exercise

supporting_science.finding: Endurance training increases mitochondrial enzyme activity and oxidative capacity in skeletal muscle.
